title: SPCA needs blankets and pet food
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route SPCA...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route SPCA (GRSPCA), in collaboration with Ratpack MCC, is hosting a coffee and pancake run at the SPCA's premises in Ossie Urban Road, Tamsui Industria.


> The event will take place on Sunday 7 July at 11:00.


The GRSPCA is urgently needs donations of blankets, pet food, and cash to support their vital work.

Donations can be dropped off at Checkers in York Street or at Landy World on Foundry Street. All contributions will be delivered to the GRSPCA on the day of the fundraiser.All are welcome to attend, enjoy coffee and pancakes (starting from R20), and contribute additional donations on the day.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
